mapper.insert: MERGE INTO USER_CREDIT_LV2 t USING (SELECT #{userId} AS user_id FROM dual) s ON (t.user_id = s.user_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.employment_type = #{employmentType}, t.residence_type = #{residenceType} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_id, employment_type, residence_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{employmentType}, #{residenceType})

MERGE INTO USER_CREDIT_LV3 t USING (SELECT #{userId} AS user_id FROM dual) s ON (t.user_id = s.user_id) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.loan_purpose = #{loanPurpose}, t.total_debt = #{totalDebt}, t.existing_loan_count = #{existingLoanCount} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (user_id, loan_purpose, total_debt, existing_loan_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{loanPurpose}, #{totalDebt}, #{existingLoanCount})

INSERT INTO USER_INPUT_HISTORY ( history_id, user_id, input_type_code_value_id, input_json_path, created_at ) VALUES ( #{historyId}, #{userId}, #{inputTypeCodeValueId}, #{inputJsonPath}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
